case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS HATCHETT ALICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $597.20 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT HATCHETT ALICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
